# Timeline
Vertical activity timeline for logs, history, and changelogs.
## Import
```tsx
import { Timeline } from "@/components/ui/timeline";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Timeline itemCount={3} brand={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **itemCount** (number) — default: `3`: Items shown
- **brand** (string): Brand
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add timeline
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/timeline
```
